pi_items.source: task.json requirements (10% AY, 10% BX, 10% BY; 4 trials each = 12 total)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an entirely synthetic AX-CPT experiment with exactly 40 trials, split into 28 target trials (AX) and 12 distractor trials (4 AY, 4 BX, 4 BY). The metadata incorrectly claimed there were 4 distractor trials, referring to the count per distractor type rather than the total. The required file paths for the condition CSV and PsychoPy experiment are verified to be /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/ax_cpt_conditions.csv and /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ax_cpt.psyexp respectively.
